arts.ttl: Bavarian Fashion Works: More details on Bayern Munich’s next Oktoberfest kit emerge
arts.sum: The shirt is said to be inspired by traditional dirndl designs. Quite fitting, since the last Oktoberfest kit was inspired by the traditional Lederhosen look of Bavarian men.

arts.ttl: Inter Milan’s Benjamin Pavard eager to face old friends at Bayern Munich during Champions League tilt
arts.sum: Inter Milan defender Benjamin Pavard is looking forward to seeing some of his ex-teammates at Bayern Munich when the two clubs square off in the Champions League on April 8th. Bayern Munich will get well acquainted with its ex-defender...

arts.ttl: Hiroki Ito: Could the versatile defender ease Bayern Munich's injury crisis?
arts.sum: Injury has prevented Hiroki Ito having a consistent run of games since joining Bayern Munich last summer, but that could all be about to change after Alphonso Davies and Dayot Upamecano returned from international duty with long-term injuries of their own. The 25-year-old's three league starts at left-back this season, against Frankfurt, Leverkusen and Bochum, provide a glimpse of what Kompany can expect.

arts.ttl: Aleksandar Pavlović has started his comeback in his quest to return to the Bayern Munich squad this season
arts.sum: Aleksandar Pavlović is working on his comeback and has now begun light strength training. Since then, the 20-year-old has had to sit on the sidelines and watch Germany and Bayern make do without his services, unable to train or do anything but rest.

arts.ttl: Why Bayern Munich’s Alphonso Davies — and everyone else — was shocked by severity of injury
arts.sum: According to an in depth report from Joshua Kloke of The Athletic (via @iMiaSanMia ), no one thought Bayern Munich left-back Alphonso Davies was seriously hurt in the match against the USMNT last weekend — including Davies: If that is truly the case, Bayern Munich should heavily consider shutting down Davies until January.

arts.ttl: 'Goretzka fandom' disrupts latest Bayern training session, TZ reports
arts.sum: The combative midfielder appears to have a drove of super-fans crying out for his attention.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern to ship Wanner out for another loan spell next season
arts.sum: The wide playmaker is expected to gain further experience for the future away from his current employers.

arts.ttl: Report: Spanish journalist links Real Madrid talent to Bayern
arts.sum: If reports are to be believed, Arda Guler could be courted by Bayern Munich according to a number of sources.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich plan to recall six loan players early for Club World Cup
arts.sum: Germany's preeminent footballing publication reports that FC Bayern Munich plan on giving six loan players an audition at the forthcoming Cub World Cup in the USA.

arts.ttl: Thomas Müller rallies the troops as Bayern Munich races down the gauntlet
arts.sum: Check out the Bavarian Podcast Works — Emergency Edition, which covers the season ending injury to Alphonso Davies and Dayot Upamecano’s long-term issue as well. Bayern Munich ’s Thomas Müller does say.
